title: hemicarpha micrantha var. drummondii
intro: Hemicarpha micrantha var. drummondii, also known as Drummond's sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and acting as a natural antihistamine. Hemicarpha micrantha var. drummondii is often prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, and it may also be used in salves or poultices to apply directly to the skin.
